summary: Frontend Render Strategy VERIFIED - ALL TESTS PASSED. Hero poster renders immediately (opacity 0.6→1, not 0→1). First 2 ScrollRows (Trending Now, Continue Your Story) use eager prop - render real cards immediately without IntersectionObserver gate. First 6 trending cards have loading='eager'. Lazy rows (Fresh Stories, Unfinished Worlds) show shimmer until scrolled to. No 12-second timeout killing poster. Mobile (390x844) and Desktop (1920x1080) both render above-the-fold content immediately.
critical_code_review_comments: ScrollRow component has 'eager' prop (line 342) - when true, sets visible=true immediately bypassing IntersectionObserver gate - VERIFIED
HeroSection poster opacity starts at 0.6 (line 140) instead of 0 - always partially visible - VERIFIED
Hero poster has loading='eager' and fetchPriority='high' (line 136) - VERIFIED
First 2 ScrollRows (Trending Now, Continue Your Story) use eager flag (lines 672, 677) - VERIFIED
First 6 trending cards use priority={idx < 6} which sets loading='eager' (line 673) - VERIFIED
No 12-second timeout killing poster - removed completely - VERIFIED
Mobile card width is 160px, desktop is 220px - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend render strategy verified. Key findings: 1) Hero poster starts at opacity 0.6 (always visible), transitions to 1 on load, 2) ScrollRow 'eager' prop bypasses IntersectionObserver - first 2 rows render immediately, 3) First 6 trending cards have loading='eager', 4) Lazy rows (Fresh Stories, Unfinished Worlds) show shimmer until scrolled to, 5) No 12s timeout killing poster, 6) Mobile cards are 160px wide, desktop 220px.
